title: Lesser & Pavey Brown Faux Leather Door Stop for Home Or Office Use | Stylish Weighted Door Holder for Everyday Interior Spaces | Decorative and Practical Doorstop for Hallway, Living Room, Or Study
features: FAUX LEATHER DOORSTOP FOR MODERN HOMES: This brown faux leather door stop combines practical function with a sleek design, perfect for contemporary and traditional interior settings.
SUITABLE FOR LIVING ROOM, STUDY, OR HALLWAY: Weighted for stability, this door holder is ideal for keeping doors open in busy households, office spaces, or high-traffic areas.
NEUTRAL TONE FOR VERSATILE STYLING: The rich brown finish complements a wide range of décor styles, from rustic and industrial to minimalist and classic interior themes.
COMPACT AND EASY TO MOVE AROUND: Designed for everyday use, this soft-sided doorstop is easy to reposition and won't scratch floors, making it a convenient choice for all rooms.
A PRACTICAL GIFT FOR NEW HOMES: This stylish yet functional accessory makes a great gift for housewarmings, birthdays, or anyone setting up a new home or redecorating a space.
